test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseID": "POS_001_LTE_Attach_Success",
    "title": "Validate Successful LTE Attach Procedure for Single UE",
    "description": "Verify that a single UE can successfully perform LTE attach procedure under excellent radio conditions as per 3GPP TS 23.401 Clause 5.3.2.1.",
    "preconditions": [
      "Test setup is a single cell with only one active UE under excellent LTE radio conditions (LTE RSRP as per Clause 4.6).",
      "All other cells are powered off.",
      "UE is powered off before test start."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Configure the test setup according to the test configuration and record the parameters in the test report.",
      "Activate the serving LTE cell under test.",
      "Start logging to capture call flow and signaling messages.",
      "Power ON the UE to initiate LTE attach.",
      "Wait for successful attach confirmation (attach complete message) in the logs.",
      "Stop logging and save the test logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE successfully attaches to the LTE cell.",
      "Attach success rate for this iteration is 100%.",
      "Attach latency (time between attach request and attach complete) is recorded."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE remains attached until power off or detach."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "Connect via SSH using `admin@<IP>` to access CLI if applicable for test setup and log start/stop."
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Analyze captured logs for attach request and attach complete messages per 3GPP TS 23.401.",
      "Confirm UE attached to correct cell (PCI, Global eNB ID, ARFCN) as per test configuration."
    ],
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING"
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "POS_002_LTE_Detach_Success",
    "title": "Validate Successful LTE UE-Initiated Detach Procedure",
    "description": "Verify that a single UE can successfully perform LTE detach procedure by powering off the UE as per 3GPP TS 23.401 Clause 5.3.8.2.1.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is attached to LTE cell under excellent radio conditions.",
      "Test setup as per POS_001."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Start logging to capture signaling messages.",
      "Power OFF the UE to initiate detach.",
      "Wait for successful detach confirmation (detach accept message and UE context release) in the logs.",
      "Stop logging and save the test logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE successfully detaches from LTE cell.",
      "Detach success rate for this iteration is 100%.",
      "Signaling connection release messages (UE context release, RRC connection release) are observed."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE is detached and powered off."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "Connect via SSH using `admin@<IP>` if needed to start/stop logs."
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Analyze logs for detach request and detach accept messages.",
      "Validate signaling connection release messages per 3GPP TS 23.401."
    ],
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING"
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "POS_003_5G_NSA_Attach_Success",
    "title": "Validate Successful 5G NSA Attach with Secondary Node Addition",
    "description": "Verify that a single UE can successfully perform 5G NSA attach, including secondary node addition as per 3GPP TS 23.401 Clause 5.3.2.1 and 3GPP TS 37.340 Clause 10.2.1.",
    "preconditions": [
      "Test setup is a single cell with only one active UE under excellent 5G NSA radio conditions (5G SS-RSRP as per Clause 4.6).",
      "All other cells are powered off.",
      "UE is powered off before test start."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Configure the test setup according to the test configuration and record parameters.",
      "Activate LTE and 5G cells under test.",
      "Start logging to capture call flow and signaling messages.",
      "Power ON the UE to initiate 5G NSA attach.",
      "Wait for successful attach confirmation and secondary node addition (SgNB addition request and SgNB reconfiguration complete) in the logs.",
      "Stop logging and save the test logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE successfully attaches to LTE cell and adds 5G secondary node.",
      "Attach and secondary node addition success rate is 100%.",
      "UE attached to correct cells (PCI, Global eNB ID/Global gNB, ARFCN/NR-ARFCN) as per configuration."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE remains attached and secondary node active."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "Connect via SSH using `admin@<IP>` for CLI access if applicable."
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Analyze logs for attach request, attach complete, SgNB addition request, and SgNB reconfiguration complete messages.",
      "Confirm correct cell identities in UE logs."
    ],
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING"
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "POS_004_5G_NSA_Detach_Success",
    "title": "Validate Successful 5G NSA UE-Initiated Detach Including Secondary Node Release",
    "description": "Verify that a UE performs successful detach in 5G NSA scenario including LTE detach and 5G secondary node release as per 3GPP TS 23.401 Clause 5.3.8.2.1 and 3GPP TS 37.340 Clause 10.4.1.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is attached to 5G NSA cell with secondary node active under excellent radio conditions.",
      "Test setup as per POS_003."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Start logging to capture signaling messages.",
      "Power OFF the UE to initiate detach procedure.",
      "Wait for successful detach confirmation including detach accept and secondary node release messages in the logs.",
      "Stop logging and save the test logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE successfully detaches from LTE and 5G secondary node is released.",
      "Detach success rate is 100%.",
      "Signaling connection release and SCG configuration release messages are present.",
      "Secondary node release follows the MN or SN initiated procedure with proper message flow."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE is detached and powered off."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "Connect via SSH using `admin@<IP>` if needed to start/stop logs."
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Analyze logs for detach request, detach accept, UE context release, RRC connection release, and secondary node release messages.",
      "Verify message flow matches 3GPP TS 37.340 Clause 10.4.1."
    ],
    "category": "POSITIVE TESTING"
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "NEG_001_Attach_Failure_Under_Poor_Radio_Conditions",
    "title": "Validate LTE Attach Failure Under Poor Radio Conditions",
    "description": "Verify that LTE attach procedure fails when UE is under poor radio conditions (RSRP below minimum coupling loss as per Clause 4.6).",
    "preconditions": [
      "Test setup is single LTE cell with UE under poor radio conditions (RSRP below threshold).",
      "All other cells are powered off.",
      "UE is powered off before test start."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Configure test setup with radio conditions below minimum coupling loss.",
      "Activate LTE cell.",
      "Start logging.",
      "Power ON UE to initiate attach.",
      "Wait for attach failure or timeout.",
      "Stop logging and save logs."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Attach procedure fails or times out.",
      "Attach success rate is 0%.",
      "No attach complete message observed.",
      "Logs contain failure reason related to radio conditions."
    ],
    "postconditions": [
      "UE remains detached."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [
      "Use `admin@<IP>` SSH session to adjust test setup if applicable."
    ],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Check logs for attach failure messages or absence of attach complete.",
      "Validate radio measurement reports show poor RSRP."
    ],
    "category": "NEGATIVE TESTING"
  },
  {
    "testCaseID": "NEG_002_Detach_Failure_Without_Proper_Signaling",
    "title": "Validate UE Detach Failure Due to Missing Detach Accept",
    "description": "Verify behavior when detach request is sent but detach accept is not received due to signaling issue.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is attached to LTE or 5G NSA cell under excellent radio conditions.",
      "Detach accept messages from network are blocked or lost."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Start logging.",
      "Power OFF UE to initiate detach.",
      "Simulate network signaling failure to prevent detach accept from reaching UE.",
      "Observe UE behavior and logs for timeout or retry.",
      "Stop logging."
    ],
    "expectedResults":
